reviews.review_description: The software is well done.Can you open up the local image mode?I want to give my chid an unforgettable personal photo exhibition.

I Looooove this app...It's like getting a private viewing in an art gallery.  The gallery itself is so calming with beautiful lighting. Very relaxing and tranquil setting to look at the pieces. That they change often and you can come regularly whenever you want to just take time,wander around and look at them is amazing. 
Highly Recommend 
It would be soo cool if you added like 3D sculptures etc as well maybe in another room or you could have floors for different types of art.
Keep up the good work.
